document_summary: China Advertising Association of Commerce (CAAC) report on the establishment of the Digital Marketing Committee of China (DMCC) in Beijing on August 14, 2015. DMCC is the organization that hosted the First China Digital Marketing Conference where Liu served as judge. Documents DMCC's mission, founding members (including Google, Baidu, Tencent, NetEase), and organizational structure, establishing its credibility as a leading industry body.

snippets.text: On Aug. 14, 2015, the Digital Marketing Committee of China Advertising Association of Commerce (hereinafter referred as "Digital Marketing Committee of China") was established in Beijing.
snippets.subject: DMCC
snippets.reasoning: Establishes the founding date and official name of DMCC, the organization that later appointed Liu as judge.

snippets.text: Digital Marketing Committee of China (DMCC) is a non- profit organization that is voluntarily initiated and founded by outstanding Internet technology enterprises, digital marketing service enterprises, data technology research and service institutions, digital media and other entities and industry experts in China, focusing on the field of digital marketing. The member entities include the world famous technology enterprises, large platform group companies, industrial Internet ecological companies, big data technology companies, mobile Internet companies, digital marketing comprehensive companies, large Internet of Things application enterprises, digital media groups, digital business research institutions, etc.
snippets.subject: DMCC
snippets.reasoning: Describes DMCC's composition: founded by outstanding Internet technology enterprises and industry experts. Members include world-famous technology enterprises, demonstrating organizational prestige.

snippets.text: Founded in 1981, China Advertising Association of Commerce, formerly known as China Foreign Economic and Trade Advertising Association (CFETAA), is the first national advertising association in China. In Sep. 2005, with the reform of government institutions, approved by the Ministry of Commerce and the Ministry of Civil Affairs, China Foreign Economic and Trade Advertising Association changed its name to China Advertising Association of Commerce (CAAC). [Details]
snippets.subject: CAAC
snippets.reasoning: CAAC is the first national advertising association in China (founded 1981), approved by Ministry of Commerce and Ministry of Civil Affairs. Parent organization of DMCC.

snippets.text: Closely surrounding the national strategies of "Belt and Road Initiative", "Made in China 2025" and "Internet +", as well as the initiatives of the Ministry of Commerce on cultivating Chinese brands, the Committee is committed to promoting the Internet transformation of China's traditional industries, accelerating the development of the Internet industry itself, enhancing the ability of Chinese enterprises to use the Internet to build brands, building a platform for technical exchange and resource integration in the field of digital marketing, training professionals in the industry, assisting relevant parties to formulate digital marketing industry standards, promoting the healthy, benign and orderly development of China's digital marketing, and building the most credible digital marketing industry organization in China.
snippets.subject: DMCC
snippets.reasoning: DMCC's mission is aligned with national strategies and aims to build 'the most credible digital marketing industry organization in China', establishing its significance.

snippets.text: The first Chairman and Vice Chairman entities were elected by vote, and NetEase was elected as the Chairman Entity, with Li Li, CEO of NetEase Media Group, as the Chairman. The Chairman said that the sponsors of the Digital Marketing Committee are all pioneers and leaders in the digital field. The focus of the Committee's work is to first bring together new ideas and new driving forces to build a new development platform for "Internet +" in relevant fields and enterprises. At the same time, Baidu, Google, Tencent Guangdong and Trend Watch were elected as Vice Chairman Entities. Upon the nomination by the representative of the Chairman Entity and the approval of resolution of the Council, Jianyun Hang from Committee Preparatory Office were appointed as the Secretary General, and Xiao Dai was appointed as the Deputy Secretary General. At the same time, five professional working groups including International Cooperation Group, Data Technology Group, Mobile Marketing Group, Digital Media Group and Regional Development Group were set up to carry out the annual work and Google, Tencent Guangdong, Baidu, NetEase and Trend Watch will serve as the group leaders, and other
snippets.subject: DMCC
snippets.reasoning: DMCC leadership includes NetEase (Chairman), Baidu, Google, Tencent (Vice Chairmen). Sponsors described as 'pioneers and leaders in the digital field'. Establishes DMCC's elite composition.

snippets.text: Digital Marketing Committee of China will promote the communication and integration between the digital marketing industry and brand enterprises through industry seminars, subject research, trend release, industry standard formulation and other methods, and will hold the "First China Digital Marketing Conference", at the same time, will also release the Anti- Internet Advertising Traffic Hijacking Convention, China Mobile Marketing Standards and other industry standards, as well the annual China Digital Marketing Industry Report, China Brand Digital Assets List and other major industry trend research reports. In addition, the Committee will assist the industry to use all resources and networks to promote the development of the new digital marketing economy, attract more talented people, and promote brand owners to understand the value of technological innovation and digital marketing.
snippets.subject: DMCC
snippets.reasoning: DMCC's planned activities include holding the First China Digital Marketing Conference (where Liu judged), releasing industry standards, and publishing major industry research reports.
